text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I stop by a fast-food restaurant—only
to bump into Meisho Doto.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Are you here to eat too, Trainer? I'm here
because Taiki invited me.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, here she comes! Welcome back, Taiki.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for the hold up! ☆ Oh, looks like your
trainer's here, too!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I say that's great timin'! How 'bout we all eat
together?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle then begins to heap several
hamburgers on top of the table.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yikes! Th-that is quite a lot... don't you
think?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Well, consider this a show of my thanks! You
always have a pen to spare when I need one!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I hereby name this present the "Hamburger
Tower." It's as big as my gratitude toward ya!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
A present... for me?! Are you sure?! I-I'm so
happy!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I was hopin' you'd be! But don't force yourself to
eat the whole thing. We can have the rest to go!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: No, I'll eat everything. That's how...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I'll repay your thoughtfulness, Taiki!
choice_data_list: It's okay to pace yourself and savor it.
Show your thanks by finishing it all.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Y-you're right. It's better if I savor such a
wonderful present!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yes ma'am! I'd appreciate it much more if you
enjoy the food!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-okay. Well, better get started! Ehehe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto enjoys what she can, experiencing
the full flavor of the hamburgers!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Okay! Well... here I go!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Nom... Munch, munch! Ish sho delicioush!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, talk about impressive! You eat like a
starved coyote!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto attacks her meal with vigor,
consuming everything down to the last bite.
